info.title: TMDb API
info.description: The Movie Database (TMDb) API v3. Community-based movie and TV data including search, details, ratings, and account management.

get.description: Test your API key to confirm it is valid.
Create a temporary guest session for rating movies and TV shows.
Create a temporary request token to validate a TMDb user login.

post.description: Create a session ID after the user has approved the request token.

get.description: Retrieve public account details by account ID.

post.description: Mark a movie or TV show as a favorite.

favorite.description: Whether to add or remove from favorites

get.description: Get the list of favorite movies for an account.
Get the list of favorite TV shows for an account.

post.description: Add a movie or TV show to your watchlist.

get.description: Get the list of rated movies for an account.
Get the list of rated TV shows for an account.
Get the list of rated TV episodes for an account.
Get all lists created by an account.
Get the top level details of a movie by ID.
Get a list of movies ordered by popularity.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 code to filter release region

get.description: Get a list of movies ordered by rating.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 code to filter release region

get.description: Get a list of upcoming movies in theatres.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 code to filter release region

get.description: Get a list of movies that are currently in theatres.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 code to filter release region

post.description: Rate a movie on a scale of 0.5 to 10.

delete.description: Delete a user rating for a movie.

get.description: Get the details of a TV show.
Get a list of TV shows ordered by popularity.
Get a list of TV shows ordered by rating.

post.description: Rate a TV show on a scale of 0.5 to 10.

delete.description: Delete a user rating for a TV show.

get.description: Get the primary person details by ID.
Get a list of popular people.
Search for movies by title.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 code to filter release region

get.description: Search for TV shows by title.

parameters.name: first_air_date_year
parameters.description: Filter by first air date year

get.description: Search for people by name.
Search for movies, TV shows, and people in a single request.
Discover movies by different types of data like average rating, number of votes, genres, and certifications.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort results by the given option

parameters.name: with_genres
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of genre IDs to include

get.description: Discover TV shows by different types of data like average rating, number of votes, genres, and networks.
Get the list of official movie genres.
Get the list of official TV genres.
Get the trending movies, TV shows, or people.

parameters.name: media_type
parameters.description: Type of media to get trending for

get.description: Get the system wide configuration information including image base URLs and sizes.

bearerAuth.description: TMDb API read access token (v4 auth). Pass as 'Authorization: Bearer <your_token>'.
